description: Return a list of all Equipment with details for a specified company.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[managed_equipment_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Managed Equipment ID.

parameters.name: filters[managed_equipment_category_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Managed Equipment Category ID.

parameters.name: filters[managed_equipment_type_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Managed Equipment Type ID.

parameters.name: filters[managed_equipment_make_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Managed Equipment Make ID.

parameters.name: filters[managed_equipment_model_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Managed Equipment Model ID.

parameters.name: filters[company_visible]
parameters.description: If true, return item(s) with 'company visible' status.

parameters.name: filters[current_project_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified current project ID.

parameters.name: filters[year]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified year.

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified status value.

parameters.name: filters[last_service_date]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with a last service date within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[next_service_date]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with a next service date within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

name.description: The name of the install managed equipment

company_id.description: The Comapny ID the Managed Equipment was created with

current_project_id.description: Project ids the equipment is involved in

company_visible.description: Is the equipment visible as a company equipment

updated_at.description: Date the managed equipment was updated

created_at.description: Date the managed equipment was created

deleted_at.description: Date the managed equipment was deleted

year.description: Year the equipment was manufactured in

is_active.description: if the equipment make is currently active

updated_at.description: Date the equipment make was updated

created_at.description: Date the equipment make was created

deleted_at.description: Date the equipment make was deleted

managed_equipment_make_id.description: Equipment make ID the model is associated to

managed_equipment_type_id.description: Equipment type ID the model is associated to

updated_at.description: Date the equipment model was updated

created_at.description: Date the equipment model was created

deleted_at.description: Date the equipment model was deleted

is_active.description: If the category is currently active

updated_at.description: Date the equipment category was updated

created_at.description: Date the equipment category was created

deleted_at.description: Date the equipment category was deleted

managed_equipment_category_id.description: Equipment category ID the type is associated with

updated_at.description: Date the equipment type was updated

created_at.description: Date the equipment type was created

deleted_at.description: Date the equipment type was deleted
